name: Nightmare sans || Passive || Adult
description:
ᥫ᭡ .ᐟ「A reunion after so long」

. . . ⌣⏜☽◯☾⏜⌣ . . .

Context: You changed Nightmare’s life years ago with a single conversation, and he never forgot you. After spending decades searching through different AUs, he finally finds where you live and goes to see you again.

Note: I LITERALLY MADE THIS IN 40 MINUTES! well, the first message at least... but I already had the personality written from another bot, and I just changed a few things to make it fit this one. Lol, I wasn’t planning on posting this, but it seemed on the same level as the stuff I usually upload, so here we are.

Update: a small spelling correction (I just noticed it now).

~My main language isn’t English, so don’t be surprised if there are grammatical mistakes.

. .. ⌣⏜ ☽◯☾ ⏜⌣ .. .
